site.name: Pookie Wishes
site.description: Send your loved one a full interactive surprise website. Personalised, beautiful, and unforgettable.

templates.name: Fully Custom Theme
templates.shortDesc: Don't want to follow a template? This is for you. We'll build a completely custom surprise website according to your specific themes, games, and layout ideas.
templates.longDesc:
Our Fully Custom Theme is a blank canvas. Unlike standard templates, this service involves direct collaboration with our designers. We can include custom games, unique animations, and multi-page storytelling tailored exactly to your recipient's personality. This is the ultimate pookie surprise.

Note: This is a bespoke service. Payment is required only after we handover the final link to you.
features: ⏳ Instant delivery NOT available (Requires 24-48h Build time)

templates.name: Hello Kitty
templates.shortDesc: A full kawaii experience with interactive games, love letters, and surprises. Perfect for someone who adores cute, dreamy moments.
templates.longDesc: Step into a world of soft pinks and kawaii charm. This surprise takes the recipient through an animated love letter, a virtual cake they cut, a candle wish moment, memory match game, flip cards with hidden messages, and a beautifully sealed final letter. Made with love for that special someone who deserves all the sweetness.
features: 🎁 Flip cards with your hidden messages

submitDetails.label: Birthday Person's Name
submitDetails.desc: Their real name or nickname — appears on the opening screen

submitDetails.label: Your Name (Sender)
submitDetails.desc: How you want to sign this surprise

submitDetails.label: Personal Birthday Letter
submitDetails.desc: A heartfelt birthday message — revealed step by step in the flip cards

submitDetails.label: 3 Favorite Photos
submitDetails.desc: Your favorite memories — shown in the animated photo gallery

templates.name: Harry Potter
templates.shortDesc: A magical Hogwarts-themed journey with puzzles, quizzes, and a letter by owl. For the one who believes in magic.
templates.longDesc: Welcome to Hogwarts! This magical journey takes your special person through sideways story panels, flip memory cards, Wizard Word Hunt puzzle, Sorting Hat quiz, scratch-to-reveal wish, and a final letter delivered by owl. Pure enchantment for the wizard in your life.

submitDetails.label: Witch / Wizard's Name
submitDetails.desc: The birthday person's name for their official Hogwarts letter

submitDetails.label: Your Name (Sender)
submitDetails.desc: Who is sending this magical surprise

submitDetails.label: Hogwarts House
submitDetails.desc: Which house do they belong to?

submitDetails.label: Birthday Wish Message
submitDetails.desc: A heartfelt note — revealed at the end inside their Hogwarts letter

submitDetails.label: 3 Favorite Photos
submitDetails.desc: Memories shown in the enchanted photo gallery section

templates.name: Love Trap
templates.tagline: Catch them in a web of love
templates.shortDesc: A sneaky, romantic surprise that will make them fall all over again. Interactive love-themed games and sweet messages.
templates.longDesc: Set the perfect love trap with this playful yet heartfelt website. Includes romantic animations, a 'truth or dare' style game, and personalised love notes. Perfect for proposals, anniversaries, or just because.

submitDetails.label: Their Name
submitDetails.desc: The person you're surprising — appears throughout the love experience

submitDetails.label: Your Name
submitDetails.desc: Your name or nickname to sign the love letter

submitDetails.label: Love Confession Letter
submitDetails.desc: Tell them how you feel — it becomes the centrepiece of the entire experience

submitDetails.label: 3 Best Photos
submitDetails.desc: Your favourite moments shown in the love gallery

templates.name: Celestial Universe
templates.shortDesc: A cosmic journey through the stars with interactive games, floating planets, and an interstellar music player.
templates.longDesc: Embark on an out-of-this-world adventure. This celestial surprise features an interactive star-tracing game to unlock your message, rotating 3D planets, a smooth typewriter reveal of your heartfelt notes, and a dedicated memory orbit for your photos. Accompanied by a curated interstellar music player for the perfect vibe.

submitDetails.label: Birthday Person's Name
submitDetails.desc: Their name for the celestial title screen and star dedication

submitDetails.label: Your Name (Sender)
submitDetails.desc: Who is sending this cosmic surprise

submitDetails.label: Their Date of Birth
submitDetails.desc: Used to display their zodiac sign and celestial birth profile

submitDetails.label: Star Message
submitDetails.desc: A personal birthday wish — revealed via typewriter animation in the stars

templates.name: Among Us
templates.tagline: You're Kinda Sus... But I Love You 🚀
templates.shortDesc: A hilarious and cute Among Us themed surprise. Eject your love to them!
templates.longDesc: For the gamers and the sus ones! This template features cute Among Us animations, a task-completion mini-game, an emergency meeting for your special message, and a final ejection of love. Perfect for anniversaries, birthdays, or just to say 'I love you'.

submitDetails.label: Crewmate's Name
submitDetails.desc: The birthday person's name — shown on the crew roster and mission briefing

submitDetails.label: Your Name
submitDetails.desc: Your crewmate nickname for signing the message

templates.name: Hoppers 🌿
templates.shortDesc: An enchanting forest journey inspired by Pixar magic. Featuring council messages, a beaver delivery, and a magical finale.
templates.longDesc: Welcome to the Glade! This Pixar-inspired template takes your special person on a nature-filled adventure. They will receive wisdom from the Council creatures, take the Pond Rules oath, and open a parchment letter delivered by a very determined beaver. A truly whimsical and heartwarming surprise.

submitDetails.label: Birthday Person's Name
submitDetails.desc: Their name for the forest adventure welcome and parchment letter

submitDetails.label: Your Name (Sender)
submitDetails.desc: Who wrote this adventure letter — delivered by the beaver

submitDetails.label: Birthday Message
submitDetails.desc: A warm personal message revealed on the magical forest parchment

templates.name: The Apology
templates.tagline: Because Sorry Needs More Than Just Words 🥺
templates.shortDesc: A heartfelt apology experience that goes beyond words. For when you need to say sorry and truly mean it.
templates.longDesc: Sometimes words alone aren't enough. The Apology template creates a beautiful, deeply personal experience — a heartfelt letter, romantic music, photo memories, and a redeemable Pookie Voucher. For the moments when only the most genuine sorry will do.

submitDetails.label: Their Name
submitDetails.desc: The person you're apologising to — appears in the opening and letter

submitDetails.label: Your Name
submitDetails.desc: Your name — it signs the apology letter

submitDetails.label: Apology Letter
submitDetails.desc: What you want to say — written from the heart (100–300 words works best)

submitDetails.label: Pookie Voucher Wish
submitDetails.desc: What the voucher entitles them to (e.g. 'One free hug anytime')

submitDetails.label: 3 Happy Photos
submitDetails.desc: Memories shown in the memory lane section

templates.name: Anniversary Journey
templates.shortDesc: An emotional scroll-based journey through your most precious memories, ending with a surprise heartfelt letter.
templates.longDesc: Take your pookie on a trip down memory lane. This interactive template uses smooth scroll animations to reveal your favorite photos one by one, culminating in a beautiful letter reveal. Perfect for anniversaries or milestones.
features: 💌 Surprise letter at the journey's end

submitDetails.label: Your Names
submitDetails.desc: E.g. Sahil & Priya — appears on the welcome screen

submitDetails.label: Anniversary Date
submitDetails.desc: The special date to highlight at the beginning of the journey

submitDetails.label: Your Name (Sender)
submitDetails.desc: Your name to sign off the surprise letter

submitDetails.label: 4 Special Photos
submitDetails.desc: Key moments from your journey (First date, Vacations, etc.)

submitDetails.label: Long Letter
submitDetails.desc: Write everything you feel — this is the finale surprise

templates.name: Ninja Path Adventure
templates.shortDesc: A retro arcade-style ninja adventure where you collect scrolls to reveal hidden messages.
templates.longDesc: Run, jump, and slash through the Ninja Path! This retro 8-bit adventure lets your pookie play as a ninja on a quest. Collect coins to unlock hidden scrolls containing your messages, avoid obstacles, and reach the final sanctuary to read a beautiful parchment letter. Perfect for the gaming fan in your life.
features: 🪙 Collect coins to unlock story scrolls

submitDetails.label: Ninja's Name
submitDetails.desc: The username for the hero

submitDetails.label: Final Parchment Letter
submitDetails.desc: The grand finale heartfelt message
